specializations: Film formers for skin care and color cosmetics
product_highlights: Natrosol™ HEC — versatile hydroxyethylcellulose thickener and film former
Klucel™ HPC — hydroxypropylcellulose for unique solution properties
Benecel™ HPMC — hydroxypropyl methylcellulose for multifunctional texturizing
Natural cellulose polymer portfolio for bio-based formulation
Comprehensive rheology modification across all formulation types
notes: Ashland's personal care division offers a comprehensive range of texture-modifying polymers with a strong emphasis on cellulose-based natural solutions. Their Natrosol™ hydroxyethylcellulose, Klucel™ hydroxypropylcellulose, and Benecel™ HPMC are widely used as thickeners, film formers, and texture modifiers in skincare, hair care, and color cosmetics. Ashland's natural polymer range meets growing consumer demand for bio-based texture solutions, offering COSMOS-approved options that deliver the performance of synthetic polymers with a more sustainable profile.
